directory_first_repair.audit_trail_note: Removed/replaced old codes are retained here only as repair audit metadata; they must be absent from source_families and seed_surfaces except as explicitly recorded audit-trail values.
directory_first_repair.quality_goal: prefer official directories, association member lists, chamber/cluster directories, official PDFs/download lists; remove single-company/station and weak commercial fallback sources before pi51c sync.

last_repair_note: Directory-first French source-seed quality repair: removed weak/single-company/commercial sources, added official directory/PDF/download sources, replaced APTMU homepage with members directory.
